ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the experiment */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the experiment was conducted */,
  "hardware_resources" TEXT /* Hardware resources used during the experiment */,
  "experiment_group" TEXT /* Group to which the experiment belongs */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the experiment */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the experiment */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_algorithm FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of hyperparameters */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the hyperparameters belong to */,
  "param_noise_stddev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the parameter noise */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate for the optimizer */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size for training */,
  "buffer_size" INTEGER /* Size of the replay buffer */,
  "tau" REAL /* Soft update parameter for target networks */,
  "gamma" REAL /* Discount factor for future rewards */,
  "exploration_strategy" TEXT /* Strategy used for exploration */,
  "exploration_rate" REAL /* Initial exploration rate */,
  "exploration_rate_decay" REAL /* Rate at which the exploration rate decays */,
  "target_update_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which target networks are updated */,
  "gradient_clip_value" REAL /* Value used for gradient clipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reference_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of reference metrics */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the metrics belong to */,
  "reference_Q_mean" REAL /* Mean of the reference Q-values */,
  "reference_Q_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the reference Q-values */,
  "reference_action_mean" REAL /* Mean of the reference actions */,
  "reference_action_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the reference actions */,
  "reference_actor_Q_mean" REAL /* Mean of the reference actor Q-values */,
  "reference_actor_Q_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the reference actor Q-values */,
  "reference_perturbed_action_mean" REAL /* Mean of the reference perturbed actions */,
  "reference_perturbed_action_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the reference perturbed actions */,
  "reference_reward_mean" REAL /* Mean of the reference rewards */,
  "reference_reward_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the reference rewards */,
  "reference_action_count" INTEGER /* Number of actions taken in the reference metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reference_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rollout_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of rollout metrics */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the metrics belong to */,
  "Q_mean" REAL /* Mean of the Q-values during rollouts */,
  "actions_mean" REAL /* Mean of the actions during rollouts */,
  "actions_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the actions during rollouts */,
  "episode_steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps per episode */,
  "episodes" INTEGER /* Number of episodes */,
  "return" REAL /* Return (cumulative reward) from rollouts */,
  "return_history" REAL /* Mean of the return history */,
  "return_history_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the return history */,
  "return_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the return */,
  "rollout_duration" REAL /* Duration of the rollout in seconds */,
  "rollout_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the rollout */,
  "rollout_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the rollout */,
  "rollout_steps_per_second" REAL /* Steps per second during the rollout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rollout_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of total metrics */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the metrics belong to */,
  "duration" REAL /* Total duration of the experiment in seconds */,
  "episodes" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Total number of epochs */,
  "steps" INTEGER /* Total number of steps */,
  "steps_per_second" REAL /* Steps per second during the experiment */,
  "total_reward" REAL /* Total cumulative reward over all episodes */,
  "average_reward_per_episode" REAL /* Average reward per episode */,
  "average_steps_per_episode" REAL /* Average steps per episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of training metrics */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the metrics belong to */,
  "loss_actor" REAL /* Loss of the actor network */,
  "loss_critic" REAL /* Loss of the critic network */,
  "param_noise_distance" REAL /* Distance of the parameter noise */,
  "training_duration" REAL /* Total duration of the training in seconds */,
  "training_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training */,
  "training_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training */,
  "training_steps_per_second" REAL /* Steps per second during the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_details" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the episode belongs to */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Number of the episode */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the episode */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the episode */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the episode in seconds */,
  "steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps in the episode */,
  "reward" REAL /* Total reward received in the episode */,
  "actions" TEXT /* Array of actions taken in the episode */,
  "Q_values" TEXT /* Array of Q-values observed in the episode */,
  "actor_Q_values" TEXT /* Array of actor Q-values observed in the episode */,
  "perturbed_actions" TEXT /* Array of perturbed actions taken in the episode */,
  "episode_duration" REAL /* Duration of the episode in seconds */,
  "episode_start_state" TEXT /* Initial state of the episode */,
  "episode_end_state" TEXT /* Final state of the episode */,
  "episode_max_reward" REAL /* Maximum reward achieved in the episode */,
  "episode_min_reward" REAL /* Minimum reward achieved in the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_details_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "step_details" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the step belongs to */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Number of the step in the episode */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the environment at the start of the step */,
  "action" REAL /* Action taken in the step */,
  "reward" REAL /* Reward received for the action */,
  "next_state" TEXT /* State of the environment at the end of the step */,
  "done" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the episode is done after this step */,
  "Q_value" REAL /* Q-value observed for the action */,
  "actor_Q_value" REAL /* Actor Q-value observed for the action */,
  "perturbed_action" REAL /* Perturbed action taken in the step */,
  "step_duration" REAL /* Duration of the step in seconds */,
  "step_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the step */,
  "step_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the step */,
  "step_cumulative_reward" REAL /* Cumulative reward up to this step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_step_details_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episode_details ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_value" TEXT /* Value of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_tags_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference to the algorithm's source */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Default hyperparameters for the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_author" TEXT /* Author of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_url" TEXT /* URL to the algorithm's documentation or source code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)
